label: About Me
heading: Full-stack developer, end to end.
bio: I'm Daniel, a software developer with 4 years of hands-on experience. I studied full-stack web development and work comfortably across the entire stack — from designing data models and building APIs to crafting responsive, accessible frontends.

My primary stack is MEAN (MongoDB, Express, Angular, Node.js), and I'm equally fluent in React, Next.js, and .NET / .NET Framework. I care about clean architecture, maintainable code, and shipping things that actually work.
